name: freee K.K.
summary: freee K.K. develops and provides cloud accounting and HR/labor software for individual business owners and corporations. It also offers Company establishment freee, a free service that can streamline the creation of documents that are required to be submitted at the time of company establishment; Business opening freee that offers various services related to establish a company or start a business to private business owner; and Declaration freee, a cloud-type tax reporting software for accounting firms. In addition, the company provides freee card, a business credit card for individual business owners, and small and medium-sized enterprises, as well as offer-type financing services; Invoice Finance, an invoice purchase service; and Project Management freee. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
